articles.headline: Priceless 2,500-year-old golden helmet returned to Romania after Dutch…
articles.excerpt: The ornate Cotofenesti helmet, which was stolen in January 2025 while on loan to a Dutch museum, was recovered last month.

articles.headline: Mexico to beef up security at tourist sites after shooting at pyramids
articles.excerpt: Mexico's government is boosting security at tourist sites in preparation for the World Cup after a man opened fire at the Teotihuacan pyramids.

articles.headline: Trump extends U.S. ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
articles.excerpt: The extension was announced just hours before it was set to expire. The president did not provide details on how long the new ceasefire extension will last.

articles.headline: Bitcoin inflows to Binance fall to 2023 low as BTC bulls set target on $80K
articles.excerpt: Bitcoin inflows diverge across exchanges as selling pressure eases on Binance, while Coinbase shows more dominant activity.

articles.headline: Bitcoin price rally 'in progress' but upside could be capped at $84K
articles.excerpt: Analysts say Bitcoin’s rally has begun, but the upside may be capped at an average spot BTC ETF cost basis near $84,000.

articles.headline: Bitcoin funding stays negative at $78K as short squeeze expectations grow
articles.excerpt: BTC price action slowly headed upward but funding stayed negative, a unique occurrence that analysis said would result in a short squeeze.

articles.headline: Bitcoin regains $76K as Coinbase-driven demand sustains recovery

articles.headline: Scammers demand crypto from stranded ships in Strait of Hormuz: Report

articles.headline: RaveDAO's RAVE token risks another 50% crash amid price manipulation claims

articles.headline: Cape Town battered by flooding as heavy rains persist, more downpours…
